visual: Steps backward repeatedly while one hand retracts past the ear and pushes forward as the other withdraws to the hip, body rotating with each step.
motion_description: The practitioner continuously steps backward with an alternating, slow pace, transferring weight completely onto the back foot with each step. During the step backward, the torso rotates horizontally to the side to extend both arms horizontally outwards. The torso then twists back toward the front as the rear arm folds to push a vertical palm straight forward at face level, simultaneously dropping and pulling the front hand back to rest near the hip. The entire movement flows steadily without pauses, maintaining a constant height and deliberate tempo.
